finalized_plan.description: Perform a web search using a simplified query (e.g., "Monterey Bay Aquarium first National Geographic short on YouTube entry #9 maximum length") to locate the correct Monterey Bay Aquarium website page that describes the event
Once the correct page is identified, use the visit_page tool to navigate to that page and retrieve its contents
Use the find_on_page_ctrl_f tool (or similar method) to locate the segment pertaining to "entry #9" on that page
Within the "entry #9" section, locate the text that specifies "maximum length" and extract the numeric value provided
Verify that the extracted numeric value is in meters and does not include any additional text or units
Prepare the final answer structured into three parts: a short version with just the number, an extremely detailed version outlining the extraction process, and any additional relevant context

root_cause_reasoning: The agent was never able to correctly identify the first Shorts video posted by National Geographic on YouTube
